Avg Inbound Packet Size by Type (top 10)
Avg Outbound Packet Size by Type (top 10)

panels.description: Real server ticks per second from Storm (storm_server_tick_total). Target is 10; this is the honest replacement for the mislabeled PZ 'fps' gauge.
panels.title: Ticks / sec (TPS)

panels.description: Server ticks per second over time. rate(storm_server_tick_total[1m]). Healthy = flat at 10; dips below 10 mean the server can't finish its work inside the 100ms tick budget.
panels.title: Server TPS (ticks/sec)

panels.description: How long a single server tick takes end-to-end (wall-clock cycle time between frame steps). ~0.1s when healthy at 10 TPS; p99 spikes mark stalls (GC pauses, heavy ticks).
panels.title: Server Tick Duration (p50 / p95 / p99)
